proven.claim: Path condition: if (changes.length === 0) { console.log("No proof changes."); return; }
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P3
; LINE: 274
; Path condition: if (changes.length === 0) { console.log("No proof changes."); return; }
; Prove: this log implies an empty changes array

(declare-const changes_length Int)
(declare-const line_274_executes Int)  ; 1 = this log statement runs

; Transition: guard evaluates changes.length === 0 before entering the block
(assert (>= changes_length 0))
(assert (=> (= line_274_executes 1) (= changes_length 0)))

; Attempt to falsify: log fires despite non-empty changes
(assert (= line_274_executes 1))
(assert (> changes_length 0))
(check-sat)
